title: lithocarpus longanoides
intro: Lithocarpus longanoides, also known as the Himalayan white oak, is a plant species that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Lithocarpus longanoides is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
